Hi, I'm Soumya.

BCA Graduate from Bharati Vidyapeeth University (CGPA 9.5/10, Semester V: 10.0/10). Passionate about software engineering and building scalable web applications. Experienced in developing RESTful APIs, database systems, and full-stack solutions using Node.js, Express.js, PostgreSQL, PHP, and Python.

~ A little about me

The human behind the code ✨

I'm a BCA Graduate from IMED Bharati Vidyapeeth University, Pune — and I genuinely love what I do. Whether it's building a backend API at 2am or cleaning a messy dataset before breakfast, there's something deeply satisfying about making things work beautifully.

I bridge the gap between software development and data analysis — and I bring a designer's eye to everything I build. I believe code should be readable, data should tell a story, and products should feel human.

Currently seeking internship and full-time opportunities where I can grow, contribute, and keep learning something new every day.

⭐ SGPA 10.00 · Sem V · Dr. Patangrao Kadam Scholar

~ things I've built

Featured Projects

Each project is a story — click to explore

Featured
🏢
Node.js Express.js PostgreSQL QR Code

AWSM – Asset Workstation Smart Monitoring

Backend system for tracking 3500+ institutional assets at IMED. QR-code identification, admin/staff authentication, search & filtering, and full asset lifecycle management.

View Details
🏠
PHP MySQL CRUD

StayMate – Accommodation Management

Web-based accommodation management system with a well-designed relational database schema, complete CRUD operations for property and tenant information.

View Details
💰
Python Data Analysis Aggregation

Expense Tracker

Python application to record and categorise daily expenses. Performs data aggregation for expense summaries and trend analysis, with structured data storage.

View Details
🍳
UI/UX Design Power BI Prompt Engineering

Self Growth

Currently exploring and learning more concepts, languages etc. WORK IN PROGRESS.
